definition.title: Global payroll made simple
definition.subtitle: Understanding global payroll solutions
definition.description: Streamline payroll processing across multiple countries with automated compliance, real-time reporting, and seamless currency management.

trustSignals.title: Trusted by companies worldwide
trustSignals.subtitle: Numbers that reflect our commitment to excellence and client success.

keyPoints.title: Multi-country processing
keyPoints.description: Unified payroll processing across 160+ countries with local currency support and compliance. Process all your global payrolls from a single platform.

keyPoints.title: Tax compliance
keyPoints.description: Automatic tax calculations, withholdings, and filings according to local tax regulations in each country. Stay compliant with all tax requirements.

keyPoints.title: Accurate calculations
keyPoints.description: Precise salary calculations including overtime, bonuses, deductions, and statutory benefits. Ensure every employee is paid correctly.

keyPoints.title: Timely payments
keyPoints.description: On-time salary payments in local currencies with proper banking and payment processing. Never miss a payroll deadline.

mainDescription.title: What is Payroll Services?
mainDescription.description: Payroll services involve the comprehensive management of employee compensation, including salary calculations, tax withholdings, benefits administration, and compliance with local labor and tax regulations. Our global payroll solutions ensure accurate, timely, and compliant payroll processing across 160+ countries, handling everything from data collection to final payment disbursement.

services.title: Payroll services we offer
services.description: We provide end-to-end payroll services covering all aspects of global payroll management and compliance. From processing to reporting, we handle everything.

items.title: Payroll Processing
items.description: Comprehensive payroll processing including accurate salary calculations, overtime, bonuses, and deductions management.

items.title: Tax Management
items.description: Complete tax management services including calculations, withholdings, filings, and year-end reporting.

items.title: Benefits Administration
items.description: Full benefits administration covering health insurance, pensions, statutory benefits, and voluntary benefits.

items.title: Reporting & Analytics
items.description: Advanced reporting and analytics with payroll reports, cost analytics, compliance reports, and custom reporting.

process.title: How our payroll process works
process.description: Our streamlined payroll process ensures accurate, efficient, and compliant payroll processing. From data collection to final payment, we guide you through every step.

steps.title: Sign service agreement
steps.description: We establish a service agreement outlining the terms, responsibilities, and scope of our payroll services for your global workforce.

steps.title: Employee onboarding
steps.description: We handle all employment documentation, local contracts, and onboarding processes according to each country's legal requirements.

steps.title: Ongoing management
steps.description: We manage payroll, taxes, benefits, compliance, and all administrative tasks while you focus on your business operations.

steps.title: Compliance monitoring
steps.description: We monitor compliance with local tax regulations, labor laws, and statutory requirements in every country. Our local tax experts stay updated with regulatory changes and ensure all payroll processing meets compliance standards.

eorComparison.title: Payroll vs EOR
eorComparison.subtitle: Understanding the differences to choose the right solution
eorComparison.description: While payroll services handle payment processing, Employer of Record (EOR) provides complete employment management. Understanding the differences helps you choose the right solution for your needs.

options.description: Payroll processing only. You remain the legal employer with full compliance responsibility.
features: Ideal for: Companies with compliance teams
options.bestFor: Companies with local entities and compliance expertise

options.description: We become the legal employer. Perfect when you don't have a local entity.
features: Ideal for: Market entry, remote teams, quick expansion
options.bestFor: Companies without local entities, market testing, rapid expansion

technology.title: Payroll technology & reporting
technology.subtitle: Advanced payroll platform
technology.description: Our advanced payroll technology platform provides real-time visibility, automated processing, and comprehensive reporting. Access your payroll data anytime, anywhere.

features.title: Real-time dashboard
features.description: Monitor payroll status, costs, and compliance in real-time. Get instant insights into your global payroll operations.

features.title: Automated processing
features.description: Fully automated payroll calculations and processing. Reduce manual errors and save time with intelligent automation.

features.title: Comprehensive reporting
features.description: Generate detailed payroll reports, analytics, and insights. Export data in multiple formats for your accounting systems.

features.title: Multi-currency support
features.description: Process payroll in multiple currencies with real-time exchange rates. Handle currency conversions seamlessly.

items.question: How long does payroll processing take?
items.answer: Payroll processing typically takes 2-3 business days from data submission to payment. We offer expedited processing for urgent cases. Our automated system ensures fast and accurate processing.

items.question: Can you integrate with our HR systems?
items.answer: Yes, we offer API integrations with major HR systems, accounting software, and time-tracking tools. Our platform can seamlessly integrate with your existing systems for automated data transfer.

items.question: What reporting capabilities do you provide?
items.answer: We provide comprehensive reporting including payroll summaries, tax reports, cost analytics, and custom reports. All reports can be exported in multiple formats (PDF, Excel, CSV) and accessed through our dashboard or API.

items.question: How do you handle payroll compliance?
items.answer: We ensure full compliance with local tax regulations, labor laws, and statutory requirements in every country. Our local tax experts stay updated with regulatory changes and ensure all payroll processing meets compliance standards.

items.question: In which currencies can you pay employees?
items.answer: We process payroll in local currencies in each country. Employees are paid in the currency of their country of employment, in line with local regulations and your employment contracts.

items.question: Do you handle year-end tax forms and reporting?
items.answer: Yes. We prepare and file required year-end tax forms, P60/P45 equivalents, and statutory reports in each jurisdiction. You and your employees receive the documentation needed for personal tax filing.

items.question: What if an employee has multiple roles or countries?
items.answer: We can support split payrolls and multi-country arrangements where legally permitted. Share your situation with our team and we'll outline the compliant approach and any limitations.

items.question: How do I submit payroll data each cycle?
items.answer: You can submit via our portal, API, or templates. We support one-off uploads and automated integrations with your HRIS or time-tracking tools. Deadlines and instructions are provided per country.

cta.title: Ready to streamline your global payroll?
cta.description: Join hundreds of companies who trust us for their global payroll needs. Get started with accurate, compliant payroll processing.
